speaker: speaker1
text: Wei ! This is a first-you didn't bargain !

text: Bargain ? I'd feel way too guilty .

text: But you could have saved money .

text: From a sweet ma ? ! It's not worth it . Plus , I'd happily pay more for these things I bought !
